articles.author: The Conversation
articles.title: Strange Microbes Found in Shark Bay Could Reveal How Complex Life Began - ScienceAlert
articles.description: On the shores of the west coast of Australia lies a window to our past: the stromatolites and microbial mats of Gathaagudu (Shark Bay).
articles.content:
On the shores of the west coast of Australia lies a window to our past: the stromatolites and microbial mats of Gathaagudu (Shark Bay).
